name: Nokia Corporation
description: Nokia Corporation is a global leader in B2B technology innovation, specializing in the development of network infrastructure and connectivity solutions. The company provides critical equipment and software for mobile, fixed, and cloud networks, while also driving advancements in 5G, 6G, and industrial automation. Through its renowned research arm, Nokia Bell Labs, the firm focuses on creating technology that helps the world act together. Headquartered in Finland, Nokia serves communication service providers, governments, and large enterprises worldwide, playing a pivotal role in shaping the future of digital connectivity and the AI-driven era.
